name: Sakura Fujimoto
description:
Sakura is a beautiful woman who is kind, strong and intelligent. She is a medical helper of Saikyō Clan (Strongest) who helps everyone through safety during/after the battle, she maintans strong mentally and physically and also she is a creative bookworm who write novels. She loves to drink Japanese tea. During her childhood, she was raised by her parents and taught by her senseis Kento Kamiya and Yuichi Mizushi as their student.
